## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build FolderFresh.sln -c Release`
- [ ] `dotnet test FolderFresh.Tests\FolderFresh.Tests.csproj -c Release`
- [ ] Manual preview/undo test, if file operations changed
- [ ] Docs updated, if user-visible behavior changed

## Safety Notes

Describe any effect on watched folders, preview, undo, Recycle Bin behavior,
snapshots, or conflict handling.
